ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disability_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "people_with_disabilities" INTEGER /* Number of people with disabilities aged 19-64 */,
  "percent_with_public_health_insurance" REAL /* Percentage of people with public health insurance */,
  "people_without_disabilities" INTEGER /* Number of people without disabilities aged 19-64 */,
  "percent_without_health_insurance" REAL /* Percentage of people without health insurance */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state in the specified age group */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Number of males in the population */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Number of females in the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disability_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "age_group_min" INTEGER /* Minimum age in the age group */,
  "age_group_max" INTEGER /* Maximum age in the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_group_disability_data" (
  "age_group_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group data record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disability data */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "people_with_disabilities" INTEGER /* Number of people with disabilities */,
  "percent_with_public_health_insurance" REAL /* Percentage with public health insurance */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "male_population_with_disabilities" INTEGER /* Number of males with disabilities in the age group */,
  "female_population_with_disabilities" INTEGER /* Number of females with disabilities in the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_group_disability_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES disability_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_group_disability_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disability_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "total_people_with_disabilities" INTEGER /* Total number of people with disabilities */,
  "total_people_without_disabilities" INTEGER /* Total number of people without disabilities */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "male_population_with_disabilities" INTEGER /* Number of males with disabilities */,
  "female_population_with_disabilities" INTEGER /* Number of females with disabilities */,
  "male_population_without_disabilities" INTEGER /* Number of males without disabilities */,
  "female_population_without_disabilities" INTEGER /* Number of females without disabilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disability_statistics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_health_insurance" (
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance type */,
  "insurance_type" TEXT /* Name of the insurance type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the insurance type */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of coverage (e.g., individual, family) */,
  "enrollment_process" TEXT /* Description of the enrollment process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the health condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the condition (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "treatment_options" TEXT /* Treatment options available for the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disability_conditions" (
  "disability_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disability-condition record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disability data */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health condition */,
  "prevalence_rate" REAL /* Prevalence rate of the condition among people with disabilities */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "male_population_with_condition" INTEGER /* Number of males with the condition */,
  "female_population_with_condition" INTEGER /* Number of females with the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disability_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disability_conditions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES health_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disability_conditions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES disability_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, public health official) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accessed disability data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES disability_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
